stories.title: Korda goes wire-to-wire for 3rd major, again No. 1
stories.summary: Nelly Korda went wire-to-wire in capturing The Chevron Championship -- her third major title -- as she reclaimed the No. 1 spot in women's golf.

stories.title: Sources: Durant (ankle) expected to miss Game 4
stories.summary: Houston Rockets star Kevin Durant, who was diagnosed with a bone bruise in his sprained left ankle after further testing, is expected to miss Game 4 of the Western Conference quarterfinal series against the Los Angeles Lakers, sources told ESPN on Sunday.

stories.title: Story questions direction of Sox after Cora firing
stories.summary: Trevor Story said the reasoning for Red Sox manager Alex Cora being fired wasn't "satisfactory" and added that it's "up in the air what the true direction of the franchise is."

stories.title: Sources: Ant avoids ligament tear, to miss time
stories.summary: Timberwolves star Anthony Edwards has a bone bruise and hyperextension in his left knee and is expected to miss multiple weeks, sources told ESPN.

stories.title: Texas A&M lands third 2027 five-star in OT Brown
stories.summary: Texas A&M landed its third five-star recruit in the 2027 cycle in offensive tackle Kennedy Brown, No. 5 in the SC Next 300.
